violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items in the refrigerated pizza preparation cooler were found not marked with the date they were prepared. Potentially hazardous foods should be marked when held for greater than 24 hours so proper disposal can occur.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Testing strips were not available to check the sanitizing strength for the chlorine sanitizer used in the 3 compartment sink and the dish machine. Testing strips should be available and used to assure that the proper strength is used for sanitizing equipment.
